/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -Wl,-s -Wl,--gc-sections -shared  -o _oge_py.cpython-313-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/_oge_py.dir/oge_python_interface.cpp.o ../CMakeFiles/oge.dir/simcore/propagator.cpp.o ../CMakeFiles/oge.dir/simcore/utils.cpp.o ../CMakeFiles/oge.dir/environment/orbital_game_environment.cpp.o ../CMakeFiles/oge.dir/common/constants.cpp.o ../CMakeFiles/oge.dir/environment/oge_settings.cpp.o ../CMakeFiles/oge.dir/common/log.cpp.o ../CMakeFiles/oge.dir/environment/oge_state.cpp.o  libnanobind-static.a ../liboge.a
